title: Add signature policy to push tests
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Adds signature-policy to push without a destination tests.  This is tripping up our test system and I'm not sure how they ever passed without this.

comments.body: Hopefully addresses build issues for #1019 and possibly others.
Latest test error seems to be a network flake when pulling a valid image from a registry.  Going to retest.
@rhatdan could you kick the bot  please to retest, it seems to be ignoring me.

:pushpin: Commit 61d1200 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 61d120057f6942f6e43152e3e7b367ab827058a2 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
